testcase.name: mypy-py3_11-darwin
testcase.failure: src/agents/tools.py:24: note: By default the bodies of untyped functions are not checked, consider using --check-untyped-defs [annotation-unchecked] .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/fastapi/responses.py:12: error: Library stubs not installed for "ujson" [import-untyped] import ujson ^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/fastapi/responses.py:12: note: Hint: "python3 -m pip install types-ujson" .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/fastapi/responses.py:12: note: (or run "mypy --install-types" to install all missing stub packages) .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/fastapi/responses.py:12: note: See https://mypy.readthedocs.io/en/stable/running_mypy.html#missing-imports
